ui.drop_hint: Drag a file here, or click to choose one
ui.error_unsupported: This file type isn't supported yet.
ui.error_generic: Something went wrong processing this file.
ui.docx_title: Word documents need one extra step
ui.docx_step1: 1. Open the file in Microsoft Word.
ui.docx_step3: 3. Choose "Microsoft Print to PDF" as the printer.
ui.docx_step4: 4. Click Print, then choose where to save it.
email.reply_docx_subject: One extra step for Word files
email.reply_docx_body: Word can save this directly as a PDF: open it in Word, then File > Print > "Microsoft Print to PDF". See the attached pictures for each step.
email.reply_unsupported_body: Sorry, this file type isn't supported. Try sending a photo (JPG, PNG, HEIC, TIFF, BMP, WEBP, GIF) or a PDF.
email.reply_error_body: Sorry, something went wrong processing this file. Please check that the file isn't corrupted and try sending it again.
email.reply_no_attachment_body: No valid file found in your email. Please attach a file to convert.
email.reply_too_large_body: This is too large to process. Try sending fewer or smaller files.
email.reply_print_confirm_subject: Ready to print — reply YES to confirm
email.reply_print_confirm_body:
Your file is attached. Reply YES to this email to send it to the printer.

This request will expire in 24 hours if you don't reply.
email.reply_print_expired_body: This print request expired — resend if you still need it printed.
email.reply_printed_body: Printed! Your file has been sent to the printer.
email.reply_print_failed_body: Sorry, we couldn't print your file. Here's the converted PDF instead so you can print it yourself.
